mapper.select: SELECT t.id target_id, t.tenant_id target_tenant_id, t.policy_id, t.model_id model_pk, m.tenant_id model_tenant_id, m.provider_id provider_pk, p.tenant_id provider_tenant_id, p.provider_name, p.provider_type, p.adapter_code, p.api_key, p.base_url, p.status provider_status, m.model_id, m.model_name, m.model_type, m.status model_status, m.max_tokens, m.context_window, m.input_price_per_million_cent, m.output_price_per_million_cent, t.priority, GROUP_CONCAT(c.capability_code ORDER BY c.capability_code SEPARATOR ',') capability_codes FROM ai_model_route_target t JOIN ai_model m ON m.id = t.model_id AND m.del_flag = '0' JOIN ai_provider p ON p.id = m.provider_id AND p.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN ai_model_capability c ON c.model_id = m.id AND c.status = '0' AND c.del_flag = '0' WHERE t.policy_id = #{policyId} AND t.status = '0' AND t.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY t.id, t.tenant_id, t.policy_id, t.model_id, m.tenant_id, m.provider_id, p.tenant_id, p.provider_name, p.provider_type, p.adapter_code, p.api_key, p.base_url, p.status, m.model_id, m.model_name, m.model_type, m.status, m.max_tokens, m.context_window, m.input_price_per_million_cent, m.output_price_per_million_cent, t.priority ORDER BY t.priority ASC, t.id ASC
